→ AoE hits 1 target(s)

Air Genasi — Armored Escapist casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Air Genasi — Armored Escapist for 7. HP: 27/59
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Air Genasi — Armored Escapist's turn ---
Air Genasi — Armored Escapist casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS!
→ Half damage: 4
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
Air Genasi — Armored Escapist casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Air Genasi — Armored Escapist for 7. HP: 34/59
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Air Genasi — Armored Escapist HP: 15/59
→ Concentration save: [20 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Air Genasi — Armored Escapist HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
